images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: an industrial duplication machine on a conveyor line copying a single crooked, tangled network diagram into an endless receding row of identical flawed copies — chaos reproduced at scale. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) diagrams and highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent marking the repeated flaw — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
